QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_22

question.text: Which asset class is NOT available for NPS Tier II investments?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Asset Class A (Alternative Investments) is NOT available for Tier II. It includes CMBS, ABS, REITs, AIFs, InvITs, and is limited to 5% even in Tier I. **The Trap:** Candidates may think all asset classes available in Tier I are also in Tier II. Asset Class A is the exception. **Cross-Exam Context:** Tier I: E + C + G + A (max 5%). Tier II: E + C + G only. This limits Tier II diversification into alternative investments. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** When comparing Tier I and Tier II for clients, highlight this difference. Clients wanting alternative asset exposure must use Tier I.
